Table of Contents

Class PagoMapper

Namespace
BLL.Mappers
Assembly
BLL.dll

Bidirectional mapper between payment and receipt domain entities and their DTO projections.

public static class PagoMapper
Inheritance
object
PagoMapper
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Handles Pago ↔ PagoDTO and Comprobante ↔ ComprobanteDTO. Estado is stored as a string in the database and parsed to EstadoPago on read. When mapping to entity, Id is only set when the DTO's Id is non-empty, allowing the database to assign the key on insert.

Methods

ToDTO(Comprobante)

Projects a Comprobante entity to a ComprobanteDTO.

public static ComprobanteDTO ToDTO(Comprobante entity)

Parameters

entity Comprobante

Source entity. Returns null when null.

Returns

ComprobanteDTO

ToDTO(Pago)

Projects a Pago entity to a PagoDTO.

public static PagoDTO ToDTO(Pago entity)

Parameters

entity Pago

Source entity. Returns null when null.

Returns

PagoDTO

ToEntity(ComprobanteDTO)

Projects a ComprobanteDTO back to a Comprobante entity.

public static Comprobante ToEntity(ComprobanteDTO dto)

Parameters

dto ComprobanteDTO

Source DTO. Returns null when null.

Returns

Comprobante

Remarks

Id is only assigned when Id is non-empty.

ToEntity(PagoDTO)

Projects a PagoDTO back to a Pago entity.

public static Pago ToEntity(PagoDTO dto)

Parameters

dto PagoDTO

Source DTO. Returns null when null.

Returns

Pago

Remarks

Id is only assigned when Id is non-empty.
